subcodes.first_line: O servant of God, maidservant of the Covenant, handmaiden of God, pure leaf, revered spiritual mother, with Jinab-i-Aqa Mirza [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق خادم پیمان امة الله ورقه طیبه روحا والده محترمه با جناب آقا میرزا
subcodes.subjects: @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @martyrs and martyrdom, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
